title: Biden, Trump clash in debate: age takes center stage
shortDescription: The two oldest candidates hoping to win the White House sparred about age during the first presidential debate.

title: Utah Republican Mike Kennedy wins 3rd Congressional District primary
shortDescription: Kennedy’s win shows that, even in Utah, it’s still an uphill battle for Never-Trumpers in Republican primaries.

title: How Supreme Court Jan. 6 ruling may have impact on Trump
shortDescription: The Supreme Court narrowed federal obstruction charges in Jan. 6 cases, but the review might not be enough to drop counts against Donald Trump.

title: Possible options for the Democrats on the ballot
shortDescription: Democrats begin quiet discussions on presidential nominee options after Biden's lackluster debate performance.

title: Iowa Democrats consider ditching Biden after 'painful' debate
shortDescription: While many Democrats expressed deep concern after President Biden's debate against Donald Trump, state party leaders staunchly defended him.

title: Biden rejects calls to end presidential bid
shortDescription: Amid calls from some Democrats for him to bow out after a disastrous debate, a defiant President Joe Biden vowed he will beat Donald Trump.

title: Trump vs Biden debate ratings are in, show millions tuned in to watch
shortDescription: The TV ratings for Trump and Biden's first presidential debate of 2024 are in and show that 47.9 million viewers tuned to CNN to watch the showdown.

title: Top trending moments from debate: Golf handicaps, age, a Biden freeze
shortDescription: Last night's debate between Biden and Trump was the first of the presidential election season. It was filled with notable moments - for better or worse.

title: GOP raises 25th Amendment to remove Biden from power after debate
shortDescription: House Republicans are floating the 25th Amendment to deem Joe Biden unfit to serve as president and remove him from power.

title: Post falsely claims Biden fell asleep during debate | Fact check
shortDescription: At no point during the roughly 90-minute debate did Biden fall asleep. The video includes old clips of the president with his eyes closed.

title: 'I know how to do this job': Biden defiant after debate disaster
shortDescription: Amid calls from some Democrats for him to bow out after a disastrous debate, a defiant President Joe Biden vowed Friday he will beat Donald Trump.

title: Tammy Baldwin distances herself from Biden after debate night stumbles
shortDescription: Sen. Tammy Baldwin’s campaign first declined to say whether she supported Biden as nominee, then sent a terse response: “Tammy supports the president.”

title: After shaky debate, Democrats lukewarm on Biden while GOP gloats
shortDescription: Congressional Democrats, forced to answer for Joe Biden's shaky debate performance, say they are standing behind him...for now.

title: Trump earned millions from foreign businesses
shortDescription: Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington found that Trump earned millions from businesses in foreign countries while in office.

title: Here are the highlights from the first Biden-Trump debate
shortDescription: The two candidates sparred over issues, from abortion to tax cuts, and Biden's age concerns still loom large with moments of stumbles and freezing.

title: Video shows Jill Biden praise Joe's debate performance
shortDescription: First Lady Jill Biden gave President Joe Biden a warm welcome as he stepped on stage at an Atlanta hotel after Thursday's night debate.

title: President Biden’s disastrous first debate against Trump | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: SCOTUS issued three substantive rulings: emergency abortions in Idaho, a six billion dollar opioid settlement and cross-state pollution.

title: Supreme Court orders review of Jan. 6 charges against Trump and others
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ordered lower courts to determine whether obstruction charges are appropriate for defendants in the Capitol attack on Jan. 6, 2021.

title: FLOTUS cheers Biden's 'great job' at debate
shortDescription: First lady Jill Biden applauded President Biden for his debate performance against Donald Trump despite widespread criticism.

title: When will Biden, Trump meet again for second debate?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump will meet again in the second presidential debate, hosted by ABC News in September.
